prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: SON-PARACORD-100-7-TAN-CAMO
Product Type: CORD_ROPE
Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor
Existing Title: ASR Outdoor - Paracord Bundle 100 feet x .15 inch 7 Strand - Tan Camo
Description: Be prepared for any situation with the 100ft Tan Camo Paracord Bundle. It can be used in any situation: Hiking, camping, or for almost any emergency. With paracord you can use it for almost anything such as securing structures, splinting an injury, sling for an injury, a makeshift stretcher, Tourniquet, Tripwire, Tripwire Alarm, Restraints/Handcuffs, Bore Snake for Firearm, Stone Throwing Sling, Stone Throwing Sling, and so much more.
Search Terms: 550lb paracord braclet kit survival outdoor emergency edc camping gear type iii 7 strand parachute cord mil spec rope emergency preparedness outdoor rope
Features:
- WHEN RELIABILITY IS ESSENTIAL: ASR Outdoor Survival 550 Paracord s ideal for securing structures, Splinting or creating a sling for an injury, Makeshift Stretcher, Tourniquet, or Rescue Line (drowning/quicksand)
- SPECIFICATIONS: Built to Military Specifications MIL-C-5040H for Type III 550 Parachute Cord it has a breaking strength of 550lbs and a working tensile load of 220lbs in lab test. The overall thickness of the parachute cord line is 5/32" diameter and has a consistent stretch of 10% elongation
- UNIVERSAL APPLICATION: Available in multiple lengths up to 500 feet there is an option that is right for your prepper, survival, or boy scout needs. Genuine Military Grade Tactical Paracord is versatile and handy. Designed to take a beating and keep on working, never leave home without it
- TRAVELING USES: Snow Shoes, Tether Yourself to Your Bug Out Bag, Trail Markers, Across Stream Guide, Create a raft, Hauling (Dragging Gear, Timber Hitch), or Hold More Survival Gear
- EVERYDAY USES: Secure a Tent, Tarp, Hammock, Bow Drill, Repair Torn Clothing, Emergency Belt/Bracelet, Make a Strong Rope, Rope Ladder, Pet Collar / Leash, Shoelaces /Replace Broken Drawstrings, Hang Tools From Belt, or Dental Floss

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 100ft Tan Camo Paracord 550lb 7 Strand

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 100-ft 0.15 in Tan Camo Paracord Bundle

anthropic.title_differentiation: MIL-SPEC Type III, 550Lb Breaking Strength, 7 Strand, Emergency Survival, Camping And Tactical

openai.title_differentiation: 550 Lb Break Strength, Type III 7 Strand, Mil Spec, 10 Percent Stretch, Survival And Camping Use, Durable
